expectations.text: Avoids CRM-transactional language (touch base, circle back, ping, nurture)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Does not frame relationships as metrics (engagement, conversion, ROI)
Response references specific people with specific context, not generic advice
expectations.evidence: Uses names Priya/Maya/David, references coffee 3 weeks ago, baby in January, Boston taper specifics

expectations.text: Frames the task relationally (care, curiosity, gratitude) not transactionally (opportunity, leverage)
expectations.evidence: Heavy relational language: 'answer the door she opened', 'presence', 'field is still fed', 'gratitude practice'

expectations.text: Response references specific context from each person (co-founder stuck, baby, Boston training)
expectations.evidence: Cites co-founder narrative problem, baby in January, Boston April 20 taper window for David

expectations.text: Does NOT frame Maya or Priya as potential client/referral opportunities
expectations.evidence: Priya explicitly flagged 'highest stakes for the RP layer... If it becomes pipeline, route to rubinstein-productions-agent'
